title: croton pseudoniloticus
intro: Croton pseudoniloticus, also known as the "Prairie Fire" or "Fire Croton", is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Croton pseudoniloticus include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Croton pseudoniloticus is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, or applied topically as a paste or ointment to treat various ailments.
